work_completed: Registered the session and opened THREAD-008 in docs/active-threads.md.
Diagnosed Pages deployment issue as missing project-site base-path wiring.
Updated deploy-pages workflow to run actions/configure-pages and pass NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH to the Next.js build.
Updated hosting/next.config.ts to apply basePath and assetPrefix from NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH.

decisions_made.decision: Apply base-path fix in workflow + Next config instead of changing deployment target.
decisions_made.rationale: This is the minimal fix for GitHub Pages project-site path resolution and static asset loading.

handoff_record.next_agent_notes: Baseline repository lint/test checks currently fail for pre-existing issues unrelated to this pages fix (ruff violations across multiple files and pytest import errors for sleepwalker_protocol from repo root). Hosting builds pass with and without NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH.
tests_run: ruff check . (fails due to pre-existing lint violations outside scope)
python -m pytest --tb=short (fails due to pre-existing sleepwalker import errors)
